<Field name="LogMessage" size="1073741823" source="Formula: "The module " + [ModuleFullPath] + " started running at " + [StartedRunningAt] + " and "
+   IF [Result] = "Succeeded"
  THEN "successfully finished running with "
  ELSE "finished running with "
 ENDIF
+ ToString([Warnings]) + " warnings, " + ToString([FieldConversionErrors]) + " conversion errors and " + ToString([Errors]) + " errors in " + [Time] + " at " + [FinishedRunningAt] + ". Please see below for the detailed log." + CharFromInt(10) + [Log]" type="V_WString" />
